postings.title: Viatris AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
postings.evidence: This is a company research/tracker page, not a job posting. It describes Viatris' AI initiatives but does not advertise a specific role.

postings.title: Saurabh Santosh
postings.evidence: Manager IT at Viatris. Responsibilities include 'Building and optimizing scalable ETL pipelines in Azure Databricks using Python (PySpark)' and 'clinical data solutions' with AI/ML context.

postings.title: Lexie Mills
postings.evidence: Senior Manager Business Intelligence and Analytics at Viatris. Role focuses on product management, financial analysis, and business intelligence with no AI/ML duties mentioned.

postings.title: Shrusti Adlak
postings.evidence: Graduate Engineering Trainee at Viatris. 'AI/ML Enthusiast' with 'hands-on experience in tools like GPT-3, Azure Machine Learning' and 'developing a mental health chatbot using GPT-3'.

postings.title: Digant Kumar
postings.evidence: Data Analyst at Viatris. Profile mentions 'Data Scientist' background and tools like Python, Tableau, Power BI, but snippet focuses on analytics and process optimization, not AI/ML modeling.
